title: Might of the Shaman applies SPD and attack dice bonuses

plan.title: Might of the Shaman applies SPD and attack dice bonuses
plan.summary: Equip Might of the Shaman and verify the printed SPD and attack dice bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the bonuses come only from Might of the Shaman.

steps: Player 1 plays Might of the Shaman and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective SPD and attack dice.

expectedAssertions.label: Might of the Shaman remains equipped/on field

manualVerification: Confirm both bonuses apply only while Might of the Shaman remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses effective stat output for SPD and attack dice.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Might of the Shaman equipped stat modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
